Document:
# Precautionary Charges These are used to confine people indefinitely.
## Insanity Acting in such a manner which makes the offender not sound clear of mind and a danger to themselves and others, for example, attempting suicide. - Confinement until they are no longer a threat to themselves and others.
## Prisoner of War Any detained combatant as defined in the [textlink="Definitions and Glossary" link="AU14UCMJDefinitionsandGlossary"]. - Discretionary confinement, usually permanent
